'''Naga Sadow's poison blade''' was a [[Sith sword]] once owned by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]. Centuries later, the sword was found in the [[Tomb of Naga Sadow]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] during his [[Skirmish on Korriban|infiltration]] of the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. As its name would suggest, the blade was poisoned and would inflict poisonous effects upon its victims. The weapon was said to be imbued by the tainted presence of Naga Sadow.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
